			"t_o":12.8097,
			"C_o":447.629,
			"a":4.93832e-07,
			"C_x":1e+06,
			"iter":10,
			"sei":0.203885,
			"ses":0.00627338,
			"r2":0.991671,
			"slope":0.493611,
			"domain":53,
			"n":54
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
